registry_name: SecureTheCloud Copilot Governance Platform Workspace Registry

workspaces.title: Governance Command Center
workspaces.purpose: Platform landing workspace for status, workspace inventory, evidence status, assessment status, doctrine alignment, and claims boundary.

workspaces.title: Control Catalog Workspace
workspaces.purpose: Enterprise control inventory across identity, access, Purview, DLP, data protection, Copilot governance, audit, and adoption controls.

workspaces.title: Evidence Inventory Workspace
workspaces.purpose: Central catalog of synthetic assessment evidence, control results, reports, workspace snapshots, and doctrine alignment outputs.

workspaces.title: Tenant Readiness Workspace
workspaces.purpose: Synthetic readiness workspace for pilot and broad deployment posture modeling without live tenant connections.

workspaces.title: Assessment History Workspace
workspaces.purpose: Synthetic assessment history registry for generated readiness runs and evidence snapshots.

workspaces.title: Executive Dashboard Workspace
workspaces.purpose: Executive reporting shell for control coverage, risk posture, readiness, evidence completeness, and governance status.

claims_boundary: Static simulation control plane shell only. No live Microsoft tenant connection, authentication, authorization, RBAC, token issuance, runtime sessions, backend API exposure, database persistence, production enforcement, real customer data, SOC 2 certification claim, or production operating-effectiveness claim.
